series_metadata.series_description: Records contains the examiner's review of plans and status.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain machine readable records until information is superseded by new information or until record series is no longer created, then destroy by erasure. Computer data is to be backed up daily on the network server ; Paper: Retain hard copy records until information is entered onto a computer data base system, then destroy hard copy records, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
